description: CompositionPurple and white striped polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar, a half buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, applique on the left chest and a vented hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold at 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry low and dry inside-out in shadeWarm ironDesigned for the man of sophistication and crafted from premium cotton with a fashionable cut, this polo neck T-shirt from scullers offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite.
